col.title: {{name}}'s Collection
col.subtitle: All your cards
col.makePublic: Make collection public (shows on your profile)
col.nowPublic: ✓ Your collection now shows on your public profile.
col.pnlSubtitle: What you paid vs. current market value — only for cards where you recorded a cost.
col.insightsSubtitle: Your most valuable cards and which ones rose or fell the most since you added them.
col.pnlNoMarket: No current market price for these cards yet, so we can't show a result.

landing.heroSubtitle: Catalog your cards, see what they're worth, build decks that build themselves, and trade with the community — all in one place. Free.
landing.noCard: No credit card • Data via Scryfall
landing.featuresSubtitle: From catalog to marketplace: your collection's home base.
landing.f1Desc: Add by search, track quantity, condition and foil. Filter by set, rarity and name, with live total value.
landing.f2Desc: From Commander to Standard. Analysis, playtest, comparison, suggestions (EDHREC) and an AI Deck Doctor.
landing.f3Desc: Organize by theme, color and set, and see each binder's total value.
landing.f4Desc: See how much of a deck you already own, what's missing and the exact cost to complete it.
landing.f5Desc: Scryfall values in USD, converted to BRL, with a link to each card's official store page.
landing.f6Desc: Don't know the name? Find a card by its ability or effect (flying, draw a card, destroy...).
landing.f7Desc: Bring your collection via CSV (grimdeck-compatible) and take your data anytime.
landing.f8Desc: Add friends, build your public profile and show off your collection. App in English, Portuguese and Spanish.
landing.shareDesc: Generate a pretty public link to your deck or collection (vaultspell.com/p/you/deck) and send it to anyone — no account needed to view. Or share directly with friends.
landing.footerDisclaimer: Card data via Scryfall. Not affiliated with Wizards of the Coast.
landing.tradeDesc: List physical cards with a real photo, set a price or the cards you accept in trade, and chat directly with interested players — closing as sold or traded.
landing.tradeB1: Sell or trade with a real photo
landing.eventsDesc: A living agenda of tournaments, FNMs and Magic meetups, with address and time — plus a directory of stores in your area. We're closing partnerships with stores right now; the local scene is coming to your pocket.

pubprofile.title: {{name}}'s showcase
pubprofile.subtitle: Take a look at {{name}}'s public collection and decks.

market.title: Marketplace
market.subtitle: {{count}} card(s) listed for sale or trade.
market.loginPrompt: Log in to see the cards this person is selling.
market.premiumPrompt: The marketplace is a premium feature.

valuePage.subtitle: How your collection's total value has moved over time.
valuePage.needMore: Come back after a few days — the chart builds up as you use the app.

pnlPage.empty: No cards with a recorded cost yet. Add what you paid on a card to track profit/loss.
pnlPage.noMarketNote: {{count}} card(s) have no current market price yet, so they're excluded from the result.

insightsPage.premiumOnly: Collection insights is a premium feature.
insightsPage.empty: Add priced cards to your collection to see your insights.

guide.title: How VaultSpell works
guide.subtitle: A quick tour of everything you can do — from cataloguing your collection to selling cards and running events.
guide.footer: New things ship often. Check the features page to see what's coming.

collection.title: Your collection
collection.intro: Catalogue every card you own and track what it's worth.
steps: Add cards by searching, or scan them with your phone's camera.
Set quantity, condition, language and whether it's foil.
Pick the exact printing/set — change it anytime.
See your collection's live value in USD and BRL.
Record what you paid to track profit & loss (Premium).

decks.title: Decks
decks.intro: Build and organise decks in every format.
steps: Create a deck, choose its format and add cards.
Group decks into folders to stay organised.
Mark a deck public to show it on your profile.
Share a deck with a private link, or export it.
Browse community decks for inspiration.

binders.title: Binders
binders.intro: Arrange cards into virtual binders, just like the real thing.
steps: Create binders with custom names, colours and icons.
Place cards by page and slot.
Make a binder public to showcase it on your profile.
Share a binder with anyone via a link.

search.title: Search & card info
search.intro: Find any card and dig into the details.
steps: Search the full card database with images and prices.
Open a card to see every printing and live prices.
Switch a card's language (EN / PT / ES) when available.
Add a card straight to your collection or wishlist.

market.title: Marketplace & trades
market.intro: Buy, sell and trade cards with other collectors (Premium).
steps: List a card for sale, for trade, or both.
Add a price, a real photo and what you want in return.
Receive interest and chat in built-in conversations.
Close a deal as sold or traded; delete chats you don't need.
Your active listings appear on your public profile.

social.title: Friends & profile
social.intro: Connect with other players and show off what you've built.
steps: Add friends and view their profiles inside the app.
Make your collection, decks and binders public.
Choose whether to show a contact, revealed only on click.
Share any resource with a private link.

events.title: Events & stores
events.intro: Find what's happening in the local scene (when enabled).
steps: Browse upcoming events in a list or calendar.
Discover partner stores in your region.
Create your own public or private events.
Mark yourself as interested and export to your calendar.

account.title: Account & settings
steps: Switch the interface language (English, Portuguese, Spanish).
Edit your profile, avatar, bio and links.
Install the app to your home screen (PWA).
Manage your Premium subscription anytime.

userEvents.title: My events
userEvents.subtitle: Create events: casual gathering, trade/sell, or any Magic hangout.
userEvents.empty: You haven't created any events yet.
userEvents.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first!

feat.soonEvents: 🗓️ Magic events and stores near you
feat.soonCollector: 📊 Cost & profit/loss · ✅ set completion % · 📜 card rulings · 📧 weekly price digest
feat.title: The home base for your Magic collection
feat.subtitle: The only place that truly ties together your collection, decks and a marketplace — not as an add-on, but as the heart of the app. The essentials are free; two advanced features are Premium.
feat.ctaSub: Create your account in seconds and start cataloging, building decks and trading.
feat.listeningText: Missing something? Found a bug? Got an idea? Tell us — we're always listening, and the app grows with what you ask for.

collection.title: Collection & cards
collection.intro: Catalog each card once and see everything that matters: what it's worth (in your currency), which decks and binders it's in, and where to find it physically. Your collection stops being a list and becomes a living inventory.
items: Catalog by search, with quantity, condition and foil
Total value in USD and BRL (daily rate)
Filter by name, set, rarity, type, condition and foil
Prices with a link to the official store (TCGplayer/Cardmarket)
Import and export CSV (grimdeck-compatible)
Themed binders with value and physical location (page/slot)
Wishlist with price alerts (up/down + target price)
Bulk edit: condition, foil or delete many at once
Switch a card's edition (printing) or language (EN/PT/ES)
Card encyclopedia: click to see rules, price, year and legality
Collection value chart over time

decks.title: Decks that build themselves
decks.intro: Paste a list and VaultSpell does the rest: it analyzes the curve, tags each card by role, shows how much you already own, suggests cards that pair well, and even rates it with AI. All wired to what's yours.
items: Decks for any format (Commander, Standard, Modern...)
Import by pasting a list (Moxfield/Arena) and export back
Analysis: mana curve, colors, types and per-card roles
Deck vs collection: what's missing and the cost to complete
Compare against friends' or public decks, with a verdict
Playtest and pile (stack) view
AI Deck Doctor: rating, weak spots and upgrade suggestions
Card suggestions (EDHREC) flagging what you already own
Make a deck public and share it
Folders to organize decks — and share a whole folder
Browse community decks and copy them to your app in one click

search.title: Find any card
search.intro: Know the name? Autocomplete. Only remember what it does? Search by effect or ability — "draw a card", "flying" — and find the 300+ cards that do it. All via Scryfall, always up to date.
items: Search by name with autocomplete
Search by effect or ability (card text)
Ability shortcuts (flying, deathtouch, trample...)
Always up-to-date via Scryfall

trades.title: Buy, sell and trade
trades.intro: A marketplace for physical cards inside the app: list with a real photo, set a price or the cards you accept in trade, and negotiate via chat. Your wishlist even tells you when a card shows up for sale here.
items: List physical cards with a real photo
Sell (accept offers) or trade (cards you accept)
In-app chat between buyer and seller
Mark sold/traded and see platform stats

social.title: Show off and share
social.intro: Build a public profile with your best decks and your collection, and send the (pretty) link to anyone — no account needed to view. Or share directly with friends. There's even a QR to show at the table.
items: Friends by username or email
Share collection, deck or binder with friends or a public link
Pretty public links (vaultspell.com/p/you/deck)
Public profile with bio, links and contact (WhatsApp)
Show your public binders and your cards for sale on your profile

platform.title: Built to last
platform.intro: In three languages, with its own domain, secure Stripe payments and always improving. It's a living project — and the first 50 members get Premium free, forever.
items: In 3 languages: English, Portuguese and Spanish
Password recovery by email or username
Premium via Stripe — beta: free for the first 50
Own domain, secure and constantly evolving
Install as an app on mobile (PWA) — add to home screen

premium.title: What's Premium — and why
premium.intro: Almost everything here is free. Only two features need Premium to run — and here's exactly why, no fine print.
premium.f1Desc: An AI reads your deck and returns a rating, weak spots and concrete upgrade suggestions.
premium.f2Desc: Listing your physical cards for sale or trade. Browsing, buying and chatting stay free.
premium.why: Premium covers the app's real costs — servers, the AI models, and keeping prices and card data fresh — so VaultSpell stays online, fast and independent. No ads, and we never sell your data.
premium.betaNote: Beta: free for the first {{count}} members — forever.
premium.betaNoteClosed: Early-bird perk: early members get Premium free, forever.
